items.title: Introducing Design Mode in TRAE Work
items.description: A new way to create, iterate, and deliver your design work.

items.title: Introducing The New SOLO
items.description: SOLO is now in free beta early access. An invite code is required to activate SOLO Desktop and Web.

items.title: Upgrading TRAE Membership Benefits
items.description: TRAE launches new token-based pricing with four membership tiers from $3 to $100 monthly, starting February 24, 2026. A 7-day free Pro trial for new users is also available after this transition.

items.title: Ship AI Software Faster with Vercel
items.description: How to build and deploy AI software in a fast way with TRAE and Vercel

items.title: Best Practices for Agent Skills in TRAE
items.description: We've put together a guide on how to create, import, and use Agent Skills in TRAE.

items.title: Making AI Coding Safer: How TRAE Protects Your Codebase
items.description: We're introducing sandboxing and a multi-layer security system designed to reduce security risk while keeping AI productive.

items.title: Cue-Pro Technical Deep Dive
items.description: A technical deep dive into how we think and build Cue-Pro.

items.title: Introducing Cue-Pro: a bird's-eye view of your edit predictions
items.description: We upgraded Cue with repository-level edit sequences that keep you in flow
